rationale: Section 25.17 governs listing and appraisal of property overlapping taxing unit or appraisal district boundaries. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b). No conflict arises from increasing the exemption.
quote: If real property is located partially outside and partially inside a taxing unit's boundaries, the portion inside the unit's boundaries shall be listed separately from the remaining portion.
_note: No conflict. §25.17 concerns boundary-overlap appraisal coordination, not homestead exemption amounts.
